# /blueprint

> Produce or extend the project's d365-ce **domain blueprint** (per [ADR-0006](../../../design/adr/0006-doc-scope-domain-vs-feature.md)). Captures architecture diagrams (C4 system context + containers + components), security topology, solution layering, and cross-agent integration points.

## Usage

```
/blueprint [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/plan.md` (gate `PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `project.config.yaml`
- [templates/blueprint.template.md](../../templates/blueprint.template.md)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd.md` (sub-platforms in scope; entity model; security)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/tdd.md` (technical decisions to surface in C4-L3)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/d365-ce/blueprint.md`. Bootstrap from template if absent.
2. Update / append per current feature:
   - **C4-L1 System Context** — actors, external systems, the CE domain boundary
   - **C4-L2 Containers** — model-driven app, Canvas apps, Power Pages portal, PCF controls, PA flows
   - **C4-L3 Components** — per sub-platform, the key components introduced by this feature
   - **Solution layering** — base / extension / project-customisation per [constitution/06-publisher-and-solution.md](../../constitution/06-publisher-and-solution.md)
   - **Security topology** — security roles + FLS + hierarchy security per [constitution/00-charter.md § Customization inventory](../../constitution/00-charter.md)
   - **NFR matrix** per feature
3. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md).
4. Run `doc_lint`; Mermaid-only blocks (no PNG/JPG references) and AI Summary present.
5. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `BLUEPRINT_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/blueprint.md`
- `.workflow.json` updated
